name: singularity
description: A full-featured digital audio workstation and creative IDE.

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@singularity/shared' build && bun run --filter '@singularity/ui' build && bun run --filter '@singularity/web' build && bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter '@singularity/backend' build && bun run --filter '@singularity/cli' build && bun run --filter '@singularity/mcp' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @singularity/ui build && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter @singularity/shared build && bun run --filter '*' test && bun test engine/tests/integration
